3024300.name: Who is Abby Demo
3024300.description:
Who is Abby spans eight chapters of relaxed but gripping gameplay. Tom’s sister, has disappeared. Distrustful of the authorities Tom takes matters into his own hands.

Explore Detailed Worlds

The world has been handcrafted to every minor detail. Every location you explore is a new piece of the puzzle, teeming with details to be uncovered.

Engage the World Around You

Interact with hundreds of objects that hold the key to unravelling the mystery.

Become the Detective

Every corner hides a clue, and every clue could bring you one step closer to the truth.

Unveil the Truth Behind Abby’s Disappearance

Each discovery adds another piece to the puzzle, gradually revealing the story behind her disappearance.

Overcome the Obstacles

Tom is desperate for answers, and nothing will stand in his way.

Key Features:

Narrative-Driven Exploration: A captivating blend of narrative and gameplay, merging the immersive storytelling of walking simulators with the hands-on witty interaction of classic point-and-click adventures. Navigate through a multi-chapter story that keeps you guessing until the very end. With each chapter offering 8+ hours of gameplay, the game delivers a substantial experience that keeps you engaged from start to finish.

Interactive Worlds: Every environment is richly detailed and interactive, filled with clues and secrets essential to unravelling the story. The game’s vast environments reward exploration, with each chapter introducing new locations and deeper mysteries to uncover.

Stunning Graphics and Sound: Powered by Unreal Engine 5, Who is Abby delivers cutting-edge visuals and immersive soundscapes, bringing Tom’s world to life with unparalleled realism.

Full Control Customization: Enjoy seamless support for both keyboard and controller. Customize your experience with remappable keys for keyboard and mouse, as well as an invertible Y-axis.

Unlock the Bonus Museum Chapter: Venture deeper into the world of Who is Abby with a special museum chapter, packed with additional lore and secrets as you progress through the game. This bonus chapter adds even more depth to an already rich narrative experience.


Collectibles to Discover: Scattered throughout the world, collectibles await your discovery, each one adding another layer to the mystery. The extensive world is filled with secrets that encourage replayability, as you strive to uncover everything the game has to offer.

It's time to uncover the truth.
3024300.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
